title: What quitting sin actually requires
caption:
Scripture doesn't say manage your sin. It says put it to death.

That's a different thing entirely. Managing it means keeping it at arm's length while it still runs part of your life. Killing it means going after the root.

Four moves that actually work — not as a 30-day challenge, but as the actual mechanics of what mortification looks like in a real week:

Confess it by name. Find the root, not just the habit. Remove the access. Replace the void with something alive.

Colossians 3:5, then 3:12. Both matter. The "put on" is what makes the "put to death" stick.

Save this for the sin you've been managing instead of killing.

#faith #christianmen #sin #repentance #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #realmen #christianity
